title: Lane shaping prompt gate

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement #1557 so AW start surfaces a first-class lane-shaping prompt gate for broad unshaped work before implementation or slice promotion.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Use AW-owned structural/config enums and planning evidence only; do not encode GitHub-specific semantics or free-form keyword policy as authority.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Runtime helper shape, compact projection details, focused regression coverage, and dogfood evidence.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The fix would make AW decide lane semantics, require a new tracker-specific model, or broaden into general Planning decomposition redesign.
canonical_core.next_action: Validate the implemented lane-shaping gate and close out the bounded slice honestly.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py start --task "Implement #1557: require a lane-shaping prompt for broad unshaped work" --select next_safe_action,immediate_next_allowed_action --format json
completion_criteria: Broad unshaped startup work routes to present-lane-shaping-prompt.
The gate blocks implementation and slice promotion until shaping is recorded.
The ready-to-forward prompt includes evidence and questions while leaving decisions to the agent/human.
Regression coverage proves the prompt is generic and not GitHub-specific.

goal: Implement #1557 so AW start surfaces a first-class lane-shaping prompt gate for broad unshaped work before implementation or slice promotion.
non_goals: Do not redesign Planning decomposition broadly.
Do not add tracker-specific lane semantics.
Do not make AW decide the lane answer; only surface evidence and questions.
